basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Project Associate - I & II Notification 2026 has been released on 05 May 2026 on the official website of Anna University. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the AU Project Associate - I & II Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have B.E or B.Tech in Civil Engineering / Environmental Engineering / Energy & Environment with M.E or M.Tech in Environmental Engineering or Environmental Management, M.Com, MBA, or MCA are eligible to apply for these Project Associate - I & II vacancies. The offline application process for Project Associate - I & II Recruitment 2026 has sta

qualification.education_qualification: B.E or B.Tech, M.E. / M.Tech/ M.Com / MBA / MCA
qualification.details: Project Associate - II: B.E or B.Tech. in Civil Engineering / B.E Environmental Engineering and B.E Energy & Environment with M.E or M.Tech Environmental Engineering or Environmental Management. Final year M.E. / M.Tech. Student can also eligible to apply. Project Associate - I: B.E or B.Tech. in Civil Engineering / B.E Environmental Engineering and B.E Energy & Environment / M.Com / MBA / MCA

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anna University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Anna University Project Associate posts is 15-05-2026. Candidates are strongly advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Associate posts?
faq.answer: Anna University is recruiting for a total of 6 vacancies for the posts of Project Associate - I and Project Associate - II. These positions are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Associate - II?
faq.answer: For the Project Associate - II position, candidates need to have a B.E or B.Tech. in Civil Engineering / B.E Environmental Engineering and B.E Energy & Environment with M.E or M.Tech Environmental Engineering or Environmental Management. Final year M.E./M.Tech. students are also eligible.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these Project Associate positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for both Project Associate - I and Project Associate - II posts will receive a consolidated monthly salary ranging from Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 30,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for Anna University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, according to the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for these posts?
faq.answer: The application process for the Anna University Project Associate recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection criteria for the Project Associate posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate positions at Anna University will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Which city and state is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by Anna University, located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. The pincode for the location is 600025.

faq.question: Q9. Can final year M.E./M.Tech students apply for Project Associate - II?
faq.answer: Yes, the notification explicitly states that final year M.E. / M.Tech. students are eligible to apply for the Project Associate - II position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can typically be found on the official website of Anna University. Links to the official notification PDF and the application portal are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
